title: Smile
description: This resource pack adds a smiley face to pretty much every mob and there are also some smile on a few other things to. Put a smile on those mob faces
body: This resource pack replaces every mob face with a smiley face instead apart from ravagers, enderman and parrots apart from that everything else is the same. There are also some hidden faces hiding among textures. Download if you want to make mobs happier.![normal minecraft villager and a smiling minecraft villager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2600491c5fa98de1e6b1d36588381d490feac92f.png)
